library.title: Library
library.lead: Open, read, annotate. Research on a wide screen.
library.footerNote: Notes via Hypothes.is ┬Ę research links on desktop only
reader.blankConsult: Select a term or open a link to consult.
viewport.limitedBody: This library is designed for a wide screen: annotate, read, and consult side by side. On this device you get the book and notes only ŌĆö no research links.
viewport.hypoReload: If notes (Hypothes.is) do not appear, reload the page.
theme.tipLight: Theme: light ŌĆö click for dark
theme.tipDark: Theme: dark ŌĆö click for system
theme.tipSystem: Theme: system ŌĆö click for light
settings.title: Settings
settings.urlPrefsHint: Query strings write through to localStorage, e.g. ?lang=pt&theme=dark&density=hi&font=1.125&prov=l,w. Clear site data restores defaults.
settings.notesNote: Notes live in your Hypothes.is account (not exported here).
settings.readerNote: Typography and research links are controlled in the reader. Theme cycles on the library toolbar.
page.about.title: About
page.about.p1: LŌłÖIŌłÖBŌłÖRŌłÖUŌłÖS (short: LIBRUS) is a study library: annotate to assimilate.
page.about.p2: Three panes on a wide screen: annotate (Hypothes.is), read (book), consult (research). Notes and highlights use Hypothes.is (their account and servers). Research links open in the consult pane on wide screens; mobile is read + annotate only.
page.about.p3: Built as a static site (nano-ssg): Markdown in, HTML library out.
page.contact.title: Contact
page.contact.lead: Questions, suggestions, or feedback about LŌłÖIŌłÖBŌłÖRŌłÖUŌłÖS are welcome.
page.contact.p1: For project and code topics, open an issue on GitHub.
page.contact.p2: Doctrine and study questions are best discussed in your local Spiritist centre or study group.
page.help.title: Help
page.help.lead: Quick start for the three-pane reader.
page.help.s1: Serve the public/ folder (npm start), not the repo root.
page.help.s2: Open a book from the library.
page.help.s3: Read in the center; annotate with Hypothesis on the left (wide) or standard sidebar (narrow).
page.help.s4: On a wide screen, select a term or click a link to consult on the right.
page.help.s5: Use Contents to jump sections; search in the main toolbar.
page.help.s6: Cycle text size on the reader toolbar.
page.help.s7: On wide screens, open Links (link icon) for density and providers (lightbulb / globe / book).
page.help.s8: Theme and settings live on the library home. Library button always returns home.
page.help.paneRead: Read ŌĆö book text, search, contents, typography.
page.help.paneConsult: Consult ŌĆö Luz Esp├Łrita, Wikipedia, Wiktionary (wide only).
page.help.urlBody: Query strings write through to localStorage, for example ?lang=pt&theme=dark&density=hi&font=1.125&prov=l,w.
page.help.mobileBody: Narrow screens show the book and notes only ŌĆö no research links. Prefer landscape desktop for the full experience.
page.help.notesBody: Log in via Hypothes.is. Export notes from your Hypothesis account. App settings export only preferences (not annotations).
page.legal.title: Legal
page.legal.p1: Educational digital edition. Allan KardecŌĆÖs codification texts are public domain. Digital organization and this interface follow the repository license.
page.legal.p2: Annotations created with Hypothes.is belong to that service and your account ŌĆö not to LŌłÖIŌłÖBŌłÖRŌłÖUŌłÖS.
page.legal.p3: Preferences (theme, language, density, typography) stay in your browser (localStorage), including values set via URL query strings. There is no LŌłÖIŌłÖBŌłÖRŌłÖUŌłÖS user account on these static pages.
